user.title: Connect to Elering
user.description: Enter your Elering Client Portal API credentials and meter EIC.

init.title: Update Elering API credentials
init.description: Update the Client Portal client_id/client_secret or meter EIC used for Elering DataHub requests.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your Elering client ID, client secret, and meter EIC.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Elering DataHub. Try again later.
